description: An abstract graphic titled "Decomposed" presents a 2x2 grid composed of four equal square cells. The top-left and bottom-right cells are filled with a light green colour, while the top-right and bottom-left cells are filled with a light orange colour. A single blue circular dot is centrally positioned within the top-left light green cell. Another single blue circular dot is centrally positioned within the bottom-right light green cell. This visual conceptually illustrates the decomposition process, where ground displacement data from European Ground Motion Service (EGMS) Calibrated (L2b) products is separated into discrete geospatial layers containing purely vertical and purely east-west displacement components, as applied in the generation of EGMS Ortho products.
